title.en: China-to-Tunisia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入突尼斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入突尼西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Tunisia INNORPI standards, IEC 62109 inverter safety, STEG / ANME grid-connection and self-production pathways, and 50 Hz grid expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与突尼斯INNORPI标准、IEC 62109逆变器安全、STEG / ANME并网和自发自用路径以及50Hz电网要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與突尼西亞INNORPI標準、IEC 62109逆變器安全、STEG / ANME併網和自發自用路徑以及50Hz電網要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INNORPI standard-scope determination, STEG grid-connection approval, ANME eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, designers, and installers should verify current Tunisian standards, laws, grid procedures, utility requirements, customs requirements, and project documents with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INNORPI标准适用范围裁定、STEG并网批准、ANME资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或调试前，应与合格专业人士核实现行突尼斯标准、法律、并网程序、公用事业要求、海关要求和项目文件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INNORPI標準適用範圍裁定、STEG併網批准、ANME資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或調試前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行突尼西亞標準、法律、併網程序、公用事業要求、海關要求和項目文件。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Tunisia, there is no single public source showing a universal product certificate that automatically replaces project review. The practical gaps are IEC 62109 inverter safety evidence, any applicable INNORPI-adopted NT standards or tender standards, STEG / ANME grid-connection documentation for low-voltage or medium-voltage projects, compliance with the renewable self-production legal route under Law 2015-12, 50 Hz grid compatibility, and proof that China GB/T reports are mapped rather than treated as automatic Tunisian acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口突尼斯时，公开资料未显示存在一个可自动替代项目审查的通用产品证书。实际差距包括IEC 62109逆变器安全证据、适用的INNORPI采纳NT标准或招标标准、低压或中压项目的STEG / ANME并网资料、符合2015-12号可再生能源自发自用法律路径、50Hz电网兼容性，以及证明中国GB/T报告已做映射而非被视为突尼斯自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口突尼西亞時，公開資料未顯示存在一個可自動替代項目審查的通用產品證書。實際差距包括IEC 62109逆變器安全證據、適用的INNORPI採納NT標準或招標標準、低壓或中壓項目的STEG / ANME併網資料、符合2015-12號可再生能源自發自用法律路徑、50Hz電網相容性，以及證明中國GB/T報告已做映射而非被視為突尼西亞自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, energy agency, customs, standards platform, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
